• Procedural mining world with ores, custom textures, and AOE mining.
  • Audio engine with engine, drill, music, and timer‑blip sounds.
  • HUD gauges (classic, modern, pill, analog, horizontal‑bars, industrial‑step) and mobile controls.
    const Game = new GameEngine();
    Sound.init();

This code creates a tile‑based mining game where players move, drill, build blocks, and trade items. It includes a modular sound manager, customizable UI gauges, and support for mobile touch controls.
